steps.title: Identify the causal relationship
steps.content: The passage describes John Francis's military service, then states he “earned a place in history.” The transition must show this historical significance resulted from his service.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: ”In doing so” means “by doing that”—it expresses that his historical significance resulted from his service. The other three suggest exemplification, concession, or habit rather than causation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
